assertions.assertion: Explains that AddUserManagement() automatically registers IProfileService
assertions.rationale: Does not mention AddUserManagement(); manually implements and registers IProfileService.

assertions.assertion: Mentions that claims mapping is based on requested scopes (openid → sub, email → email)
assertions.rationale: Shows claims being filtered by RequestedClaimTypes, and discusses scopes.

assertions.assertion: Notes that custom user attributes can be exposed via custom identity resources
assertions.rationale: Shows custom identity resource with custom claim types.

assertions.assertion: Sets LoginUrl and LogoutUrl in IdentityServer options to point to account pages
